projects.name: Website học từ vựng tiếng anh
projects.description: Developed a website for learning and reviewing English vocabulary. Key features include CRUD operations for users, vocabulary, and topics; providing traditional and flashcard learning methods; allowing users to add favorite words to a notebook; and tracking learning progress.

projects.name: Website bán quần áo online
projects.description: Built an online clothing sales website. Customers can view and purchase items, use coupons for discounts, receive order confirmation emails, and rate purchased products. The admin panel allows tracking products, orders, and managing coupons.
